title: 24Pcs Reusable Ice Cubes for Drinks Whiskey Stones Christmas Gifts - Stainless Steel Stone, Non Melting Ice Cube - Metal Ice Cubes Set, Gifts for Men Husband and Dad
features: 【Large package for cool longer】: With a set of 24 stainless steel ice cubes and 2 high-quality coasters,1 stainless steel tong, 6 transparent plastic storage boxes. It can meet the demand of many people when you have a party or drink and refill for a long time, without worrying about the embarrassing scene of running out of cold whiskey stones in the middle of the party.

【Enjoy drinks without dilution】: Our non-melting ice cubes will help you keep the original flavor of your drinks, from whiskey to brandy, rum, beer, vodka, liqueur, and more. Help your family or friends enjoy 100% strong whisky and 100% pure juice at the party.

【Durable and reusable】: Made of food grade corrosion-resistant 304 stainless steel, these whiskey stones are rust-proof and can be reused multiple times without losing their effectiveness, making them a cost-effective and eco-friendly alternative to traditional ice cubes.

【Easy to use and clean】: Simply freeze the stainless steel ice cubes for 3-5 hours before using, and then clean them easily with the accompanying plastic storage boxes or dishwasher, saving you time and effort.

【Perfect Gift for Everyone】: Regardless of your gender this can be a perfect gift for everyone in your life for occasions like Birthday, Anniversary, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year, House Warming etc. to bring out the spirit of joy.
description: Product Description Pairs well with a wide variety of whiskeys. Examples: Irish Whiskey, Scotch Whiskey, Japanese Whiskey, Tennessee Whiskey, Rye or Bourbon and Ortega, Spirits, White Wine, etc.Can be used in a variety of beverages. Example: coffee, soda, juice, tea. It won't dilute or change the flavor of your drink.
